prompt: Can you make this on-brand for Bishop AI? I have a LinkedIn graphic I want to post — it needs to look professional and match our visual identity. Walk me through what styling choices to make.

assertions.name: recommends_dark_background
assertions.description: Response recommends Deep Navy or Dark Navy as background option

assertions.name: specifies_text_color_logic
assertions.description: Response explains smart color selection (light text on dark bg, dark text on light bg)

assertions.name: gold_as_primary_accent
assertions.description: Response positions Gold (#E0B848) as the primary accent for key elements

assertions.name: mentions_typography_hierarchy
assertions.description: Response mentions Poppins for title and font hierarchy

assertions.name: gives_actionable_steps
assertions.description: Response provides step-by-step or numbered actionable guidance, not just passive description

assertions.name: mentions_premium_feel
assertions.description: Response conveys the dark/premium brand aesthetic of Bishop AI
